addGuestPlayer.fullNote: Full — will be added as reserve (queue)

coAdmin.title: Co-admins
coAdmin.seriesHint: Co-admins now live at the club (series) level and apply to every session — this list still works for this session specifically.

costManager.title: Cost split settings
costManager.gapDescSpread: Spread to all = divide among everyone
costManager.gapDescOwner: Owner pays = owner absorbs the gap
costManager.shuttleNote: Shuttle cost is calculated from shuttles used per match (the +shuttle button in the queue) — requires the queue system.
costManager.shuttleDescPerShuttle: Per shuttle = shuttles in match ÷ players in match
costManager.shuttleDescPerMatch: Per match = each player pays in full for shuttles used (no split)
costManager.shuttleDescByHour: By hour = each hour's shuttles ÷ players present that full hour
costManager.hourlyNoSlots: Set the club start–end time first to enter shuttles per hour
costManager.shuttleEvenCountHint: Blank/0 = auto-counted from actual games played

courtManager.title: Manage courts
courtManager.empty: No courts yet — add one below
courtManager.addTooltip: Add new court to the list
courtManager.renameTooltip: Edit name then press Enter to rename court

dashboard.empty: No data yet — add players and start matches to see stats

levelsManager.title: Skill levels
levelsManager.description: Shared across all clubs — real = numeric value for calculation, label = display name
levelsManager.usingGlobalDefault: Using shared default levels — first edit will create a club-specific set
levelsManager.usingClubSet: Using this club's own level set
levelsManager.empty: No levels yet — add one below
levelsManager.deleteWarning: Players using this level will become unspecified after deletion
levelsManager.deleteTooltip: Delete level — players using this level will become unspecified

lockedPairs.title: Locked pairs
lockedPairs.description: Force 2 players to be paired together when building the queue
lockedPairs.lockTooltip: Force these 2 players to be paired every time the queue is built
lockedPairs.windowWarnCreate: ⚠️ {shorter} isn't here for the whole session — locking with {longer} will schedule {shorter} as often as {longer} (above their time-based quota)
lockedPairs.windowWarnRow: {shorter} isn't here the whole session but is locked with {longer}, so they'll be scheduled equally (above their time-based quota)
lockedPairs.overQuota: This pair is already queued together {count} game(s) past its quota

queuePanel.bulkAssignCourtTooltip: Assign the same court to all selected matches
queuePanel.bulkStartTooltip: Start selected matches (auto-assign free courts, skip ones not ready)
queuePanel.bulkDeleteDialogBullet1: Completed matches revert the games counted for their players (−1)
queuePanel.bulkDeleteDialogBullet2: Last-played time and per-game pair locks are not restored
queuePanel.toastBulkStartNone: Could not start · skipped {skipped} (not ready or no free court)
queuePanel.toastBulkStartGone: Those matches are no longer waiting
queuePanel.toastBulkError: Something went wrong — please try again
queuePanel.noCourts: No courts set up — add courts in Settings before building matches
queuePanel.revertTooltip: Cancel this match and return it to the pending queue (clears the court)
queuePanel.revertConfirmBody: This match returns to “Pending” at its original position and its court is cleared (counted shuttles reset too). You can start it again anytime.
queuePanel.toastReverted: Match returned to the pending queue
queuePanel.sideAWinsTooltip: {name} wins — also records the sets entered
queuePanel.sideBWinsTooltip: {name} wins — also records the sets entered
queuePanel.noResultTooltip: Record match as finished with no winner (entered sets are saved)
queuePanel.toastSetIncompleteError: Fill in both scores of each set
queuePanel.shuttleDecrTooltip: Decrease shuttles used in this match
queuePanel.shuttleIncrTooltip: Increase shuttles used in this match
queuePanel.deleteDialogBullet1: This match will be permanently deleted
queuePanel.deleteDialogBullet2Completed: Players' game count will be decremented by 1
queuePanel.deleteDialogBullet3: Shuttle cost for this match will be removed from the split
queuePanel.deleteDialogBullet5: Last-played time + locked-pair game count will not be reverted
queuePanel.manualNoCourts: No courts set up — add courts in Settings
queuePanel.priorMeetingsWarning: This pair has met {count} time(s) before
queuePanel.manualPartialHint: Pick any number (at least 1) — save now and fill the rest later, but you can't start until the roster is full
queuePanel.courtOptionalHint: Tap to pick a court (optional) — set it before starting · tap the selected court again to clear
queuePanel.editMatchAria: Edit this match's players and court
queuePanel.generateQueueTooltip: Generate the session's matches so everyone reaches their target (courts assigned later)
queuePanel.generateDialogMinHint: Late arrivals / early leavers get a pro-rated target
queuePanel.generateDialogSuggestHint: Suggested {range} game(s)/player so everyone meets everyone ({count} players)
queuePanel.lockMismatchTitle: Locked pairs with unequal time — the shorter-staying player is pulled up to their partner:
queuePanel.lockMismatchItem: {shorter} will be scheduled as often as {longer}
queuePanel.regenerateTooltip: Delete every not-yet-started match and reshuffle for more varied partners/opponents (playing & finished matches untouched)
queuePanel.regenerateConfirm: Delete {count} not-yet-started matches and reshuffle them all?
queuePanel.startWaitingWinnerTooltip: Waiting for the previous match's winner
queuePanel.rerollTooltip: Re-roll — repick this match's players from the latest queue (court/position kept)
queuePanel.toastRerolledSwap: Swapped players with another queued match

queueSettings.title: Queue rotation settings
queueSettings.description: Used by the automatic queue rotation system
queueSettings.rotationModeDesc: Fair Queue = everyone rotates, Winner Stays = winner remains, Fair + winner fallback = everyone rotates but winner stays when the bench is short
queueSettings.rotationFairWinnerFallbackFull: Everyone rotates; winner stays only when the bench is short
queueSettings.winnerStaysMaxDesc: How many consecutive wins before forced rest (0 = unlimited)
queueSettings.queueModeDesc: Algorithm for selecting the next players
queueSettings.maxSkillGapDesc: Players whose skill levels differ by more than this will not be paired together (0 = no limit)
queueSettings.balanceStrictnessDesc: How strictly to enforce balance when not enough similarly-skilled players are available
queueSettings.balanceStrictnessTooltip: Strict mode may stall the queue if no players within the skill gap are available
queueSettings.balanceLockedPairsDesc: Apply skill-gap check to locked pairs vs. their opponents too (Off = locked pairs bypass balance checks)
queueSettings.timeLimitDesc: Shown as a hint for the referee (0 = no limit)
queueSettings.realtimeEnabledDesc: On = queue & roster auto-update across devices without refreshing
queueSettings.discardTooltip: Discard changes and revert to the last saved settings

tabs.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

visibility.title: Access
visibility.checkboxDescription: Anyone with the link can view the roster, queue, and dashboard without logging in — cost information is hidden

createForm.namePlaceholderAdhoc: You can name it later when you upgrade
createForm.adhocToggleHelper: No need to name it now — you can name it later when you upgrade to a permanent club

deleteClub.confirmLabel: Type the session name "{name}" to confirm

kick.bullet1: All matches this player is in (pending / in progress / completed) will be
kick.bullet2: If in a locked pair, that pair will be automatically released
kick.bullet3: The player will be removed from cost splits (court fee / shuttle fee / named expenses)
kick.bullet4: Other players' game counts already recorded will not change

page.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete this session including all players, matches, and expenses — cannot be undone
page.guestHint: Sign in with LINE to create a club (guest mode can only join clubs)
page.emptyWithCreate: No clubs yet. Try creating your first one.

lineImport.triggerTooltip: Paste a sign-up message and the system will extract the player list automatically
lineImport.emptyResult: No names found in this message

bulkSelect.editSessionTooltip: Edit session time for selected players
bulkSelect.sessionDialogNote: Tick only the fields you want to change — empty time = use club window
bulkSelect.deleteBullet1: All matches these players are in (pending / in progress / completed) will be
bulkSelect.deleteBullet2: If in a locked pair, that pair will be automatically released
bulkSelect.deleteBullet3: The first reserve will be automatically promoted to fill each vacated slot
bulkSelect.setLevelTooltip: Set the level for selected players
bulkSelect.levelDialogNote: Choose a level to apply to everyone selected

playerList.noPlayers: No one has signed in yet
playerList.dragReserveAriaLabel: Drag up to promote to active
playerList.dropToPromote: Drop here to promote to active
playerList.dragUpHint: Drag up to promote to active
playerList.sessionEditorClubWindow: Leave blank to use club window ({start}–{end})
playerList.unlinkHint: The player reverts to unlinked and won't receive bills/notifications on LINE
playerList.linkKnownHint: Match this player to a member who already scanned into one of your clubs — no need to scan again
playerList.linkKnownDesc: Choose a LINE account to link with "{name}"
playerList.linkKnownEmpty: No members have scanned into your clubs yet (or all are linked)

payment.invalidId: Invalid number/ID (10-digit mobile or 13-digit national ID)
payment.markPaidTip: Record that this player has paid
payment.noPromptpay: Set up PromptPay above to show the QR
payment.nothingToCollect: Nothing to collect yet — set court/shuttle fees first
payment.uploadInvalid: File must be a PNG/JPG/WebP image under 1MB
payment.qrImageHint: This QR has no amount — tell the player to enter ฿{amount}
payment.numberPriorityNote: Using the PromptPay number — this image is used only when no number is set
payment.pushLineTip: Send bill + QR to all LINE-linked players who haven't paid yet
payment.pushGroupTip: Post bill + QR into the club's LINE group, tagging unpaid players grouped by amount
payment.pushGroupDisabledTip: No LINE group bound yet — bind a group first
payment.groupBillNoQr: No PromptPay set for this club — the bill will be text-only (no QR)
payment.groupBillChunkWarn: Long list — will be split into {n} messages
payment.groupBillOverflowNote: List too long — some entries were dropped
payment.groupBillCancelTip: Close without posting the bill to the group

slip.noPromptpay: Set up PromptPay first to send slips

receipt.bankIncomplete: Please fill in both bank and account number
receipt.logoHint: Shown in place of the 🏸 icon on the header (image ≤ 1MB)

linking.title: Link players to LINE
linking.desc: Let players link their LINE account to receive the club's bills and notifications on LINE
linking.joinLinkHint: Share this link with players — once they open it and log in with LINE they appear here to be matched
linking.bindGroupHeading: Bind a LINE group to this club
linking.bindGroupStep1: 1. Invite the LINE bot into the group
linking.bindGroupStep2: 2. Send this message in the group:
linking.bindGroupNeedToken: Generate the join link first to get a token for binding the group
linking.bindGroupCopyError: Copy failed — copy the text manually
linking.bindGroupRebindHint: Want to move to another group? Post this command in the new group (the old one is replaced).
linking.unbindGroupTip: Unbind the LINE group from this club — you can't bill in the group until you rebind
linking.unbindConfirmDesc: You won't be able to bill in the LINE group until you rebind.
linking.poolEmpty: No players waiting to be matched
linking.noGuests: No unlinked players — add players in the check-in tab first
linking.tipGenerate: Create a shareable join link + QR for players to link their LINE
linking.tipRevoke: Revoke the join link — existing links stop working
linking.tipLink: Match this LINE account to a club player
linking.tipDismiss: Remove this request from the waiting list
linking.tipConfirm: Save the match and push a confirmation to their LINE
linking.joinDesc: Tap below to request linking your LINE account to {club} — the club owner will match you
linking.joinPendingDesc: Waiting for {club}'s owner to match your account
linking.joinAlreadyDesc: Your LINE account is linked to {club}
linking.joinLinkedDesc: Linked your LINE account to {club} as "{player}" — recognized from a previous link, no need to wait for the owner to match you
linking.joinInvalidDesc: This join link is invalid or has been revoked — ask the club owner for a new one
linking.joinNoSessionTitle: This club hasn't opened a session yet
linking.joinNoSessionDesc: "{series}" doesn't have an open session right now — ask the organizer to open one, then try this link again

series.noSessions: No sessions in this club yet
series.openSessionTooltip: Open a new session using this club's defaults — regulars are auto-seeded into the roster
series.openSessionArchivedTooltip: This club is archived — cannot open a new session
series.openDialogDesc: Pick a date — a new session is created from this club's defaults, and regulars are auto-seeded into the roster
series.openSuccessToast: New session opened — regulars auto-seeded into the roster
series.setActiveTooltip: Make this the club's current session
series.linkNoSessionsHint: Open a session first to manage the join link / LINE binding
series.archivedRestoreTooltip: Restore this club back into the list

seriesMembers.heading: Club members
seriesMembers.empty: No members in this club yet
seriesMembers.removeConfirmDesc: Remove "{name}" from this club's member registry
seriesMembers.removeConfirmNote: Past session attendance history is untouched — only the member link is cleared
seriesMembers.addTooltip: Add a name-only member (no LINE required)
seriesMembers.addDialogDesc: This member has no LINE link yet — it can be linked later once they join a session
seriesMembers.regularCheckboxLabel: Regular (auto-seeded every time a session opens)
seriesMembers.resetLevelsTooltip: Clear the default level of every member in this club
seriesMembers.resetLevelsConfirmDesc: Clears the default level of every member in this club — you can set them again individually afterwards

seriesPartnerPairs.title: Partner pairs
seriesPartnerPairs.description: Pairs locked at the club level — auto-instantiated as a locked pair every time a new session opens
seriesPartnerPairs.noAvailableMembers: No members available (everyone is already paired, or there are no members yet)
seriesPartnerPairs.addTooltip: Force these two members to always play together — auto-locked every time a new session opens

sessionDefaults.title: Session defaults
sessionDefaults.desc: "Open session" always reads its starting config from here — editing a value inside one session never writes back to these defaults
sessionDefaults.adoptTooltip: Copy every setting from the current session into the club's defaults
sessionDefaults.adoptConfirmTitle: Use the current session's values as defaults?
sessionDefaults.adoptConfirmDesc: This overwrites every existing default (venue, times, fees, and courts) with what's currently set on the active session
sessionDefaults.toastAdopted: Defaults updated from the current session

seriesDangerZone.heading: Danger zone
seriesDangerZone.archiveTooltip: Hide this club from the /clubs list — all history stays intact and it can be restored anytime
seriesDangerZone.archiveConfirmDesc: The club will disappear from the /clubs list — all history stays intact and it can be restored anytime
seriesDangerZone.unarchiveTooltip: Bring this club back into the /clubs list
seriesDangerZone.deleteDisabledTooltip: Delete all sessions first before deleting this club
seriesDangerZone.deleteDialogDesc: Deleting a club cannot be undone

upgradeAdhoc.cardDesc: This session was created from a temporary ad-hoc club — upgrade to a permanent club to keep members, partner pairs, and LINE links for the next session
upgradeAdhoc.upgradeTooltip: Name this permanent club — everything stays exactly where it is, nothing moves
upgradeAdhoc.dialogDesc: Give this club a name — its existing members, partner pairs, and LINE links stay exactly as they are, nothing moves
